sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Williams Companies은 2025년 기록적인 실적을 달성했으며, 2026년 조정 EBITDA 가이던스를 82억 달러로 제시했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 GAAP 순이익은 26억 1,500만 달러(주당 2.14달러)로 전년 대비 18% 증가했습니다.
2026년 조정 EBITDA 가이던스 중간값은 82억 달러로, 2025년 대비 약 6% 성장을 예상합니다.

businessChanges.text: 2025년 총 12개의 프로젝트(파이프라인 6개, 수집 2개, 심해 4개)를 성공적으로 완료했습니다.
새로운 전력 혁신 프로젝트인 'Socrates the Younger'를 발표하며 관련 자본 투자를 70억 달러 이상으로 확대했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 영업 현금흐름(CFFO)은 58억 9,800만 달러로 전년 대비 19% 증가했습니다.
운영 가용 자금(AFFO)은 58억 5,800만 달러를 기록하며 전년 대비 9% 성장했습니다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 하반기 가동 예정인 첫 번째 전력 혁신 프로젝트의 실제 수익 기여도와 파이프라인 프로젝트의 실행 속도를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 wmb_20251231xer.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 News Release Williams (NYSE: WMB) One Williams Center Tulsa, OK 74172 800-Williams www.williams.com DATE: Tuesday, Feb. 10 , 2026 MEDIA CONTACT: INVESTOR CONTACTS: media@williams.com (800) 945-8723 Danilo Juvane (918) 573-5075 Caroline Sardella (918) 230-9992 Williams Delivers Another Year of Record Results; Company to Host Analyst Day Event Today Starting at 8:30 a.m. ET TULSA, Okla. – Williams (NYSE: WMB) today announced its unaudited financial results for the three and 12 months ended Dec. 31, 2025. Natural gas focused strategy continues to drive key financial results • GAAP net income: $2.615 billion, or $2.14 per diluted share (EPS), up 18% vs. 2024 • Adjusted net income:   Normalized numeric aliases: $2.615 billion = 26억 1,500만 달러; $2.571 billion = 25억 7,100만 달러; $7.750 billion = 77억 5,000만 달러; $670 million = 6억 7,000만 달러; $2.615 = 2.615달러; $2.14 = 2.14달러; $2.571 = 2.571달러; $2.10 = 2.10달러; $670 = 670달러; $7.750 = 7.750달러.

2024 • Cash flow from operations (CFFO): $5.898 billion, up $924 million or 19% vs. 2024 • Available funds from operations (AFFO): $5.858 billion, up $480 million or 9% vs. 2024 • Raised dividend by 5% to $2.10 annualized for 2026; 52 consecutive years of dividend payments • Ended year with 2.40x dividend coverage ratio (AFFO basis) • 2026 Adjusted EBITDA guidance range of $8.05 billion to $8.35 billion, up 6% vs. 2025 at midpoint Robust project execution in 2025 fuels momentum for 2026 growth • Completed 12 projects in 2025: 6 pipeline transmission, 2 gathering and 4 Deepwater • Announced 10 projects in 2025: 5 pipeline transmission, 1 gathering, 1 storage and 3 pow  Normalized numeric aliases: $5.898 billion = 58억 9,800만 달러; $924 million = 9억 2,400만 달러; $5.858 billion = 58억 5,800만 달러; $480 million = 4억 8,000만 달러; $8.05 billion = 80억 5,000만 달러; $8.35 billion = 83억 5,000만 달러; $5.898 = 5.898달러; $924 = 924달러; $480 = 480달러; $5.858 = 5.858달러; $2.10 = 2.10달러; $8.05 = 8.05달러; $8.35 = 8.35달러.

ounger, and the upsizing and extending of contract length for two projects currently in execution • Recognized by S&P Global, CDP, ISS and MSCI for ongoing commitment to transparency, strong governance and environmental performance CEO Perspective Chad Zamarin, president and chief executive officer, made the following comments: “In 2025, Williams delivered record Adjusted EBITDA of $7.75 billion, capping a five‑year Adjusted EBITDA CAGR of 9%, and a five-year EPS CAGR of 14%. Today we are announcing 2026 Adjusted 1 EBITDA guidance of $8.2 billion at the midpoint, reflecting the ongoing strong growth of our business as we realize the benefit of pipeline transmission and offshore projects that came online in 2025, as well as expected revenues from a partial year of our first power innovation project that is expected to come online in the second half of 2026. “Our teams complet  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.75 billion = 77억 5,000만 달러; $8.2 billion = 82억 달러; $7.75 = 7.75달러; $8.2 = 8.2달러.

of pipeline transmission projects in 2025 and are advancing another 7.1 Bcf/d of pipeline projects currently in execution. In addition, we are announcing a new power innovation project, Socrates the Younger, which increases our power innovation investment to over $7 billion of capital in execution. This consistent execution in key growth areas across our expanding footprint continues to open new commercial opportunities and reinforces our critical role in the nation’s energy future.” Zamarin added, “As we look to 2026 and beyond, we are focused on delivering for shareholders through our position as the nation's natural gas infrastructure leader and our focus on reliable, affordable and clean energy infrastructure solutions. After five years of exceeding our earnings growth objectives and strong performance by our teams, we look forward to the next five years of opportunity and are excite  Normalized numeric aliases: $7 billion = 70억 달러; $7 = 7달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
